name: Sugar & Slate Bakery
description: Award-winning artisan bakery specializing in luxury wedding cakes and sculpted sugar work. Every creation is a one-of-a-kind centerpiece designed in close collaboration with the couple.

dessert_alternatives.note: We specialize in tiered cakes but also offer elegant cupcake towers and curated dessert tables.

dietary_options.note: We accommodate gluten-free and nut-free with dedicated prep. Vegan and dairy-free are not currently offered.

eco_friendly.note: We use premium packaging (custom printed boxes, satin ribbon). Eco-friendly packaging is not available at this time.

tasting_process.tasting_includes: Up to 4 cake flavors, 3 filling options, and 2 frosting styles for the couple plus 2 guests
tasting_process.note: Design consultation required before tasting. Tasting fee credited toward final order.

cancellation_policy.under_30_days: Full payment required — ingredients purchased and prep begun

service_area.note: Free delivery within 25 miles. $75 flat fee for 25-50 miles. We do not deliver beyond 50 miles — cake integrity is our priority.

sweeteners: Complimentary dessert sample box for bridal party
Free cake topper upgrade on orders over $2000
Anniversary mini-cake shipped on first anniversary

personality.negotiation_approach: Firm on pricing but generous with add-ons and upgrades. Will not discount base rates but will include extras to sweeten the deal.
quirks: Insists on a design consultation before quoting
Will gently push back on ideas that compromise structural integrity
